name: Steamed Salmon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, simmer chopped onions, minced garlic, and grated orange zest in orange juice and white wine until reduced to 1/4 cup.
2. Add the chopped canned plum tomatoes and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Season four salmon fillets (each about 4 ounces) with salt and pepper.
4. Drizzle each salmon filet with one teaspoon of virgin olive oil.
5. Top each piece of fish with a basil leaf and place on top of the simmering sauce.
6. Cover and steam for eight to ten minutes, until the fish is opaque and flakes easily with a gentle touch.
7. Makes four servings.
